Create Purchase Order with Approved Supplier
description: Procurement team creates a purchase order with an approved supplier, and the system allows the creation of the purchase order.

scenario: Attempt Purchase Order with Inactive Supplier
description: Procurement team attempts to create a purchase order with an inactive supplier, and the system prevents the creation of the purchase order.

scenario: Validate Supplier Approval Status
description: Procurement team checks the approval status of a supplier, and the system displays the correct approval status.

scenario: Procurement Team Creates Purchase Order without Approval
description: Procurement team creates a purchase order without approval from the Finance team, and the system prevents the creation of the purchase order.

scenario: Finance Team Approves Purchase Order
description: Finance team approves a purchase order, and the system updates the purchase order status to 'Approved'.

scenario: General Accounting Team Validates Purchase Order
description: General Accounting team validates a purchase order, and the system displays the correct purchase order details.

scenario: Master Data Team Updates Supplier Information
description: Master Data team updates supplier information, and the system reflects the changes in the supplier details.

scenario: Procurement Team Creates Purchase Order with Unapproved Supplier
description: Procurement team creates a purchase order with an unapproved supplier, and the system prevents the creation of the purchase order.

scenario: Boundary Case: Purchase Order Creation with Zero Quantity
description: Procurement team creates a purchase order with zero quantity, and the system allows the creation of the purchase order.

scenario: Permission Scenario: Procurement Team Creates Purchase Order without Supplier Approval
description: Procurement team creates a purchase order without supplier approval, and the system prevents the creation of the purchase order due to lack of permission.
